---
title: "Research Blog"
description: "Notes & tutorials on robotics, control theory, optimal control, JAX, and lessons from hardware experiments by Evanns Morales-Cuadrado."
listing:
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: false
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  feed: true
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
---

```{=html}
<style>
@import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Crimson+Pro:ital,wght@0,400;0,600;0,700;1,400;1,600&display=swap');

#title-block-header { display: none; }

/* Hide the auto-generated Quarto listing — we keep `listing:` in YAML
   purely so Quarto still produces /blog/index.xml for RSS subscribers. */
.quarto-listing { display: none !important; }

/* Extend the paper theme to the entire page background so any pixel the
   .rb-paper-page wrapper doesn't cover (margins, scroll bounce areas,
   below the cards on tall viewports) still reads as paper. */
/* Cover every Quarto wrapper that could leak a white bg around the paper-page.
   Everything in the blog viewport — html/body, the page grid, main content,
   margin sidebar, the column wrappers, the footer — picks up the paper tone. */
html, body,
body.quarto-light,
body.quarto-light #quarto-content,
body.quarto-light .footer,
body.quarto-dark,
body.quarto-dark #quarto-content,
body.quarto-dark .footer,
main, main.content, main.column-page,
#quarto-content, #quarto-document-content,
.page-columns, .quarto-page,
#quarto-margin-sidebar,
.column-page, .column-page-left, .column-page-right,
.page-footer, footer.footer, .nav-footer {
  background: #fefdf6 !important;
}

body.quarto-dark,
body.quarto-dark #quarto-content,
body.quarto-dark .footer {
  background: #1c2230 !important;
}

/* Match site rule's specificity to defeat the max-width: 2200px gutter. */
body.quarto-light #quarto-content,
body.quarto-light .footer,
body.quarto-dark #quarto-content,
body.quarto-dark .footer {
  max-width: none !important;
  margin-left: 0 !important;
  margin-right: 0 !important;
}

body.quarto-dark,
body.quarto-dark html,
body.quarto-dark main, body.quarto-dark main.content, body.quarto-dark main.column-page,
body.quarto-dark #quarto-content, body.quarto-dark #quarto-document-content,
body.quarto-dark .page-columns, body.quarto-dark .quarto-page,
body.quarto-dark #quarto-margin-sidebar,
body.quarto-dark .column-page, body.quarto-dark .column-page-left, body.quarto-dark .column-page-right,
body.quarto-dark .page-footer, body.quarto-dark footer.footer, body.quarto-dark .nav-footer {
  background: #1c2230 !important;
}

.page-footer, footer.footer, .nav-footer { border-top: none !important; }

/* ─────────────────  Research Blog tokens  ───────────────── */
:root {
  --rb-accent:       #2563eb;
  --rb-accent-soft:  #3b82f6;
  --rb-warn:         #f59e0b;
  --rb-muted:        #94a3b8;

  --rb-mono:    "Iosevka", "JetBrains Mono", ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Consolas, monospace;
  --rb-serif:   "Crimson Pro", "Source Serif Pro", Georgia, "Times New Roman", serif;

  /* Outer card panel — same color as the page now. The border is
     thicker and a clearer shadow does the visual separation. */
  --rb-card-bg:     #fefdf6;
  --rb-card-border: #b8ad81;
  --rb-card-shadow: 0 1px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.02), 0 6px 18px -10px rgba(124, 87, 22, 0.30);
  --rb-card-shadow-hover: 0 1px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.03), 0 14px 30px -10px rgba(124, 87, 22, 0.36);

  --rb-paper-bg:     #f9f3e1;             /* warm off-white — the inner sheet + masthead body */
  --rb-paper-ink:    #1f2937;
  --rb-paper-rule:   #d6cfb5;
}

body.quarto-dark {
  --rb-accent:       #60a5fa;
  --rb-accent-soft:  #93c5fd;
  --rb-warn:         #fbbf24;
  --rb-muted:        #94a3b8;

  --rb-card-bg:     #222a3c;     /* a hair lighter than paper bg */
  --rb-card-border: rgba(148, 163, 184, 0.38);
  --rb-card-shadow: 0 1px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.18), 0 8px 22px -10px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.55);
  --rb-card-shadow-hover: 0 1px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.18), 0 14px 30px -10px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.65);

  --rb-paper-bg:    #1c2230;
  --rb-paper-ink:   #e5e7eb;
  --rb-paper-rule:  rgba(148, 163, 184, 0.35);
}

/* Immersive layout: the paper spans edge-to-edge, no screen gutters. */
.page-columns {
  grid-template-columns: [screen-start] 0 [screen-start-inset] 0 [page-start] 0 [page-start-inset] 0 [body-start-outset] 0 [body-start] 0 [body-content-start] 1fr [body-content-end] 0 [body-end] 0 [body-end-outset] 0 [page-end-inset] 0 [page-end] 0 [screen-end-inset] 0 [screen-end] !important;
}
main.content.column-page { padding-left: 0 !important; padding-right: 0 !important; }

.rb-shell {
  max-width: 100%;
  margin: 0;
  padding: 0;
  position: relative;
  z-index: 2;
}

/* ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   ONE PAPER PAGE — wraps the entire masthead + body.
   The whole blog reads as a single journal-article page:
   front matter at top (masthead with rules, title, abstract),
   then a section heading + filter + a two-column body of
   panel "previews" of each post.
   ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */

.rb-paper-page {
  position: relative;
  width: 100%;
  max-width: none;
  margin: 0;
  padding: clamp(2rem, 4vw, 3.5rem) clamp(1.5rem, 5vw, 5rem) clamp(4rem, 6vw, 6rem);
  background: #fefdf6;     /* page bg = panel cream; inner abstract preview keeps the parchment */
  color: var(--rb-paper-ink);
  border: none;
  border-radius: 0;
  box-shadow: none;
  min-height: calc(100vh - 4.5rem);   /* fill the viewport below the navbar */
}

body.quarto-dark .rb-paper-page {
  box-shadow: none;
}

/* ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   JOURNAL MASTHEAD — front matter at the top of the paper.
   ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */

.rb-masthead {
  margin: 0;
  max-width: none;
  padding: 0;
  color: var(--rb-paper-ink);
  font-family: var(--rb-serif);
}

.rb-rule-double {
  height: 0;
  margin: 0;
  border: none;
  border-top: 3px solid var(--rb-paper-ink);
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--rb-paper-ink);
  padding-top: 4px;
}

.rb-rule-double-flip {
  border-top: 1px solid var(--rb-paper-ink);
  border-bottom: 3px solid var(--rb-paper-ink);
}

.rb-rule-single {
  border: none;
  border-top: 1px solid var(--rb-paper-ink);
  margin: 1.2rem 0 1.2rem;
  opacity: 0.85;
}

.rb-meta-row {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: space-between;
  align-items: baseline;
  gap: 1rem;
  padding: 0.55rem 0.2rem;
  font-family: var(--rb-mono);
  font-size: 0.72rem;
  letter-spacing: 0.18em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: var(--rb-paper-ink);
}

.rb-pub-name { font-weight: 700; }
.rb-pub-vol  { font-weight: 600; opacity: 0.85; }

.rb-title-block {
  text-align: center;
  padding: 2.4rem 1rem 1.6rem;
}

.rb-section-label {
  margin: 0 0 0.7rem;
  font-family: var(--rb-mono);
  font-size: 0.72rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: 0.32em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: var(--rb-accent);
}

.rb-headline {
  margin: 0 0 1rem;
  font-family: var(--rb-serif);
  font-weight: 700;
  font-size: clamp(2.4rem, 5.2vw, 4.2rem);
  line-height: 1.02;
  letter-spacing: -0.015em;
  color: var(--rb-paper-ink);
}

.rb-headline .cursor {
  display: inline-block;
  width: 0.45ch;
  margin-left: 0.15ch;
  background: var(--rb-accent);
  color: transparent;
  animation: rb-blink 1.05s steps(2, end) infinite;
}
@keyframes rb-blink { 50% { background: transparent; } }

.rb-byline {
  margin: 0;
  font-family: var(--rb-serif);
  font-size: 1.05rem;
  font-variant: small-caps;
  letter-spacing: 0.14em;
  color: var(--rb-paper-ink);
}
.rb-byline::before { content: "— "; opacity: 0.55; letter-spacing: 0; }
.rb-byline::after  { content: " —"; opacity: 0.55; letter-spacing: 0; }

.rb-abstract-block {
  max-width: 60rem;
  margin: 0 auto;
  padding: 0 1rem;
  text-align: justify;
  hyphens: auto;
}

.rb-abstract-body {
  margin: 0 0 0.8rem;
  font-family: var(--rb-serif);
  font-size: 1rem;
  line-height: 1.65;
  color: var(--rb-paper-ink);
}
.rb-abstract-body:last-child { margin-bottom: 0; }

.rb-abstract-leader {
  font-family: var(--rb-mono);
  font-size: 0.78rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: 0.14em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: var(--rb-accent);
  margin-right: 0.4rem;
}

.rb-abstract-body em { font-style: italic; color: var(--rb-paper-ink); }

/* "Keywords." line sits in the masthead and doubles as the live filter.
   Styled so the filter input reads like an inline academic-paper field
   (italic serif, dashed underline) rather than a chunky search box. */
.rb-keywords-line {
  display: flex;
  align-items: baseline;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 0.55rem 0.85rem;
  margin: 0.85rem 0 0;
  font-family: var(--rb-serif);
  font-size: 1rem;
  line-height: 1.7;
  color: var(--rb-paper-ink);
}

.rb-keywords-line .rb-filter-input {
  flex: 1 1 22rem;
  min-width: 14rem;
  max-width: 38rem;
  border: none;
  border-bottom: 1px dashed var(--rb-paper-rule);
  border-radius: 0;
  padding: 0.1rem 0 0.15rem 1.5rem;
  background-color: transparent;
  background-position: 0 55%;
  background-size: 0.85rem 0.85rem;
  font-family: var(--rb-serif);
  font-style: italic;
  font-size: 1rem;
  color: var(--rb-paper-ink);
  transition: border-bottom-color 0.18s ease;
  box-shadow: none;
}

.rb-keywords-line .rb-filter-input:focus {
  outline: none;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--rb-accent);
  box-shadow: none;
}

.rb-keywords-line .rb-filter-input::placeholder {
  color: var(--rb-muted);
  font-style: italic;
}

.rb-keywords-line .rb-filter-count {
  font-family: var(--rb-serif);
  font-style: italic;
  font-size: 0.88rem;
  color: var(--rb-muted);
  letter-spacing: 0;
}

/* Full-width intro paragraph below the masthead (single column even
   though the post body below it is two-column). */
.rb-intro-paragraph {
  margin: 1.8rem 0 1.8rem;
  font-family: var(--rb-serif);
  font-size: 1.05rem;
  line-height: 1.75;
  text-align: justify;
  hyphens: auto;
  color: var(--rb-paper-ink);
}

/* ─────────────────  Section + filter strip  ───────────────── */

.rb-section-kicker {
  margin: 0 0 0.5rem;
  font-family: var(--rb-mono);
  font-size: 0.78rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.14em;
  color: var(--rb-accent);
}
.rb-section-kicker::before { content: "§ "; opacity: 0.55; font-family: var(--rb-serif); font-weight: 700; }

.rb-section-title {
  margin: 0 0 1.2rem;
  font-family: var(--rb-serif);
  font-size: clamp(1.4rem, 2.4vw, 1.85rem);
  font-weight: 700;
  line-height: 1.15;
}

.rb-filter-strip {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 0.85rem;
  margin: 0 0 1.6rem;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
}

.rb-filter-input {
  flex: 1 1 22rem;
  min-width: 14rem;
  max-width: 32rem;
  padding: 0.55rem 0.85rem 0.55rem 2.2rem;
  border: 1.5px solid var(--rb-paper-rule);
  border-radius: 0.7rem;
  background:
    var(--rb-paper-bg)
    url("data:image/svg+xml;utf8,<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 24 24' fill='none' stroke='%23938873' stroke-width='2' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round'><circle cx='11' cy='11' r='7'/><line x1='21' y1='21' x2='16.65' y2='16.65'/></svg>") no-repeat 0.65rem center / 1rem 1rem;
  font-family: var(--rb-mono);
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  color: var(--rb-paper-ink);
  transition: border-color 0.18s ease, box-shadow 0.18s ease;
}

.rb-filter-input:focus {
  outline: none;
  border-color: var(--rb-accent);
  box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px color-mix(in srgb, var(--rb-accent) 22%, transparent);
}

.rb-filter-count {
  font-family: var(--rb-mono);
  font-size: 0.78rem;
  color: var(--rb-muted);
  letter-spacing: 0.04em;
}
.rb-filter-count strong { color: var(--rb-accent); font-weight: 700; }

/* ─────────────────  Card grid  ───────────────── */

.rb-card-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
  gap: 1.5rem;
  align-items: stretch;
  margin-top: 2.8rem;     /* breathing room below the masthead's keywords line */
}

.rb-card {
  position: relative;
  display: block;
  border: 2.5px solid var(--rb-card-border);
  border-radius: 1.35rem;
  background: var(--rb-card-bg);
  box-shadow: var(--rb-card-shadow);
  overflow: hidden;
  text-decoration: none;
  color: var(--rb-paper-ink);
  transition: border-color 0.2s ease, box-shadow 0.2s ease, transform 0.2s ease;
}
.rb-card:hover,
.rb-card:focus-visible {
  border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--rb-accent) 35%, var(--rb-card-border));
  box-shadow: var(--rb-card-shadow-hover);
  transform: translateY(-2px);
  text-decoration: none;
  color: var(--rb-paper-ink);
}
.rb-card:focus-visible {
  outline: 2px solid color-mix(in srgb, var(--rb-accent) 55%, transparent);
  outline-offset: 0.2rem;
}
.rb-card[hidden] { display: none; }

.rb-card-summary {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  gap: 1.1rem;
  padding: 1.55rem;
}

.rb-card-tags {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 0.5rem;
  margin-bottom: 0.6rem;
}

.rb-tag {
  padding: 0.28rem 0.7rem;
  border-radius: 999px;
  border: 1px solid var(--rb-paper-rule);
  color: var(--rb-accent);
  background: var(--rb-paper-bg);
  font-family: var(--rb-mono);
  font-size: 0.74rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  letter-spacing: 0.02em;
}
.rb-tag::before { content: "#"; opacity: 0.55; margin-right: 0.05em; color: var(--rb-paper-ink); }

.rb-card-name-row {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 0.85rem;
  margin-bottom: 0.45rem;
}

.rb-card-number {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  width: 2rem; height: 2rem;
  border-radius: 999px;
  background: var(--rb-paper-bg);
  color: var(--rb-accent);
  border: 1.5px solid var(--rb-paper-rule);
  font-family: var(--rb-mono);
  font-size: 0.82rem;
  font-weight: 800;
  letter-spacing: 0.04em;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}

.rb-card-name {
  margin: 0;
  font-family: var(--rb-serif);
  font-size: 1.3rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  line-height: 1.2;
}

.rb-card-meta {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 0.75rem;
  margin-bottom: 0.4rem;
  font-family: var(--rb-mono);
  font-size: 0.74rem;
  color: var(--rb-muted);
  letter-spacing: 0.02em;
}
.rb-status-pill {
  padding: 0.18rem 0.55rem;
  border-radius: 999px;
  font-family: var(--rb-mono);
  font-size: 0.7rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: 0.05em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  border: 1px solid currentColor;
}
.rb-status-pill.wip       { color: var(--rb-warn);   background: var(--rb-paper-bg); }
.rb-status-pill.todo      { color: var(--rb-muted);  background: var(--rb-paper-bg); }

.rb-card-preview-copy {
  margin: 0;
  color: var(--text-secondary);
  font-family: var(--rb-serif);
  font-size: 1rem;
  line-height: 1.7;
}

.rb-card-cta {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 0.4rem;
  margin-top: 0.5rem;
  font-family: var(--rb-mono);
  font-size: 0.85rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: var(--rb-accent);
  letter-spacing: 0.02em;
  transition: gap 0.18s ease;
}
.rb-card:hover .rb-card-cta,
.rb-card:focus-visible .rb-card-cta { gap: 0.7rem; }
.rb-card-cta .arrow { transition: transform 0.18s ease; }
.rb-card:hover .rb-card-cta .arrow,
.rb-card:focus-visible .rb-card-cta .arrow { transform: translateX(2px); }

/* ────  Preview panel: paper tear-sheet (used for ALL cards)  ──── */

.rb-paper {
  background: var(--rb-paper-bg);
  color: var(--rb-paper-ink);
  border: 1px solid var(--rb-paper-rule);
  border-radius: 0.75rem;
  overflow: hidden;
  font-family: var(--rb-serif);
  position: relative;
  /* Subtle paper-on-folder lift: warm shadow + center fold gradient. */
  box-shadow: 0 1px 0 rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.5) inset,
              0 2px 6px -2px rgba(124, 87, 22, 0.18),
              0 6px 14px -8px rgba(124, 87, 22, 0.22);
  background-image:
    linear-gradient(90deg, transparent 0, transparent 49.9%, color-mix(in oklab, var(--rb-paper-rule), transparent 80%) 50%, transparent 50.1%, transparent 100%);
}

body.quarto-dark .rb-paper {
  box-shadow: 0 1px 0 rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.04) inset,
              0 2px 6px -2px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.45),
              0 6px 14px -8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.55);
}

.rb-paper-stamp {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 0.5rem;
  padding: 0.45rem 0.85rem;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--rb-paper-rule);
  background: color-mix(in oklab, var(--rb-paper-bg), #000 4%);
  font-family: var(--rb-mono);
  font-size: 0.7rem;
  color: var(--rb-muted);
  letter-spacing: 0.14em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}
.rb-paper-stamp .section { color: var(--rb-accent); font-weight: 700; }
.rb-paper-stamp .date   { margin-left: auto; opacity: 0.8; }

.rb-paper-body { padding: 1rem 1.1rem 1.1rem; }

.rb-paper-title {
  margin: 0 0 0.35rem;
  font-family: var(--rb-serif);
  font-weight: 700;
  font-size: 1.1rem;
  line-height: 1.22;
  text-align: center;
  color: var(--rb-paper-ink);
}

.rb-paper-authors {
  margin: 0 0 0.75rem;
  text-align: center;
  font-family: var(--rb-serif);
  font-style: italic;
  font-size: 0.85rem;
  color: var(--rb-muted);
}

.rb-paper-abstract-label {
  display: block;
  text-align: center;
  font-family: var(--rb-mono);
  font-size: 0.65rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: 0.18em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: var(--rb-paper-ink);
  margin: 0 0 0.3rem;
}

.rb-paper-abstract-rule {
  border: none;
  height: 1px;
  background: var(--rb-paper-rule);
  margin: 0 4rem 0.55rem;
}

.rb-paper-abstract {
  margin: 0 0 0.6rem;
  font-family: var(--rb-serif);
  font-size: 0.82rem;
  line-height: 1.55;
  color: var(--rb-paper-ink);
  text-align: justify;
  hyphens: auto;
}

.rb-paper-fig {
  margin: 0;
  font-family: var(--rb-serif);
  font-size: 0.72rem;
  font-style: italic;
  color: var(--rb-muted);
  text-align: center;
}

/* ─────────────────  Drafts & Upcoming section  ─────────────────
   Mirrors the Tech Zone's "Planned" pattern. WIP cards keep their
   link (content exists, just unfinished); TODO cards become
   non-clickable <div>s with dashed amber borders so a visitor
   doesn't bounce to a stub.                                       */

.rb-divider {
  margin: 3.2rem 0 1.8rem;
  border: none;
  border-top: 1px dashed var(--rb-paper-rule);
}

.rb-section-kicker.warn { color: var(--rb-warn); }

.rb-section-blurb {
  max-width: 60rem;
  margin: -0.4rem 0 0.4rem;
  font-family: var(--rb-serif);
  font-size: 0.98rem;
  line-height: 1.7;
  color: var(--rb-paper-ink);
  text-align: justify;
  hyphens: auto;
}

/* WIP — solid amber-tinged border, still a link. */
.rb-card.wip {
  border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--rb-warn) 38%, var(--rb-card-border));
  background: color-mix(in oklab, var(--rb-warn), var(--rb-card-bg) 95%);
}
.rb-card.wip:hover,
.rb-card.wip:focus-visible {
  border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--rb-warn) 55%, var(--rb-card-border));
}
.rb-card.wip .rb-card-number {
  color: var(--rb-warn);
  border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--rb-warn) 35%, var(--rb-paper-rule));
}
.rb-card.wip .rb-card-cta { color: var(--rb-warn); }

/* DRAFT — dashed amber border, no link, no hover lift. */
.rb-card.draft {
  cursor: default;
  border-style: dashed;
  border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--rb-warn) 40%, var(--rb-card-border));
  background: color-mix(in oklab, var(--rb-warn), var(--rb-card-bg) 94%);
}
.rb-card.draft:hover,
.rb-card.draft:focus-visible {
  border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--rb-warn) 40%, var(--rb-card-border));
  box-shadow: var(--rb-card-shadow);
  transform: none;
}
.rb-card.draft .rb-card-number {
  color: var(--rb-warn);
  border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--rb-warn) 35%, var(--rb-paper-rule));
}
.rb-card.draft .rb-tag {
  color: var(--rb-warn);
  border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--rb-warn) 35%, var(--rb-paper-rule));
}

/* ─────────────────  Responsive  ───────────────── */

@media (max-width: 1100px) {
  .rb-card-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
}

@media (max-width: 640px) {
  .page-columns {
    grid-template-columns: [screen-start] 0 [screen-start-inset] 0 [page-start] 0 [page-start-inset] 0 [body-start-outset] 0 [body-start] 0 [body-content-start] 1fr [body-content-end] 0 [body-end] 0 [body-end-outset] 0 [page-end-inset] 0 [page-end] 0 [screen-end-inset] 0 [screen-end] !important;
  }
  .rb-shell        { padding: 0; }
  .rb-title-block  { padding: 1.8rem 0.5rem 1.2rem; }
  .rb-meta-row     { font-size: 0.62rem; letter-spacing: 0.12em; flex-direction: column; align-items: flex-start; gap: 0.2rem; padding: 0.5rem 0.2rem; }
  .rb-card-summary { padding: 1.25rem; }
  .rb-paper-body   { font-size: 0.92rem; }
}
</style>

<div class="rb-shell">

  <!-- The entire blog is laid out as ONE paper page. Front matter
       (masthead with rules + title + abstract) sits at the top; the
       body of the paper is a two-column grid of post panels. -->
  <article class="rb-paper-page">

  <!-- ───────  Journal-masthead front matter  ─────── -->
  <header class="rb-masthead" role="banner">
    <hr class="rb-rule-double rb-rule-top"/>
    <div class="rb-meta-row">
      <span class="rb-pub-name">Journal of evannsmc</span>
      <span class="rb-pub-vol">Vol. 1 · 2026 · Notes &amp; Tutorials</span>
    </div>
    <hr class="rb-rule-double rb-rule-double-flip"/>

    <div class="rb-title-block">
      <p class="rb-section-label">Research Notes &middot; Tutorials &middot; Working Drafts</p>
      <h1 class="rb-headline">Research Blog</h1>
      <p class="rb-byline">evannsmc</p>
    </div>

    <hr class="rb-rule-single"/>

    <div class="rb-abstract-block">
      <p class="rb-abstract-body">
        <span class="rb-abstract-leader">Abstract.</span>
        Explanatory pieces on robotics, control theory, optimal control, JAX, and lessons from hardware
        experiments — topics I wish had been explained to me in a particular manner, working notes for
        ongoing research threads, and small standalone tutorials I keep returning to.
      </p>

      <!-- Keywords line doubles as the live filter input. -->
      <div class="rb-keywords-line">
        <span class="rb-abstract-leader">Keywords.</span>
        <input
          class="rb-filter-input"
          type="search"
          placeholder="filter by title, topic, or #tag…"
          aria-label="Filter posts"
          autocomplete="off"
        />
        <span class="rb-filter-count" aria-live="polite">
          showing <strong id="rb-count-shown">8</strong> of <strong>8</strong>
        </span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </header>


  <!-- ───────  Published card grid (the main, decluttered view)  ─────── -->
  <p class="rb-section-kicker">published</p>
  <div class="rb-card-grid" id="rb-card-grid">

    <!-- 02 — Understanding Quadrotor Dynamics (published) -->
    <a class="rb-card" href="./posts/2025-09-29-QuadrotorDynamics/"
       data-status="published" data-tags="dynamical systems control theory quadrotor geometric control modeling"
       aria-label="Read: Understanding Quadrotor Dynamics and Control">
      <div class="rb-card-summary">
        <div class="rb-card-name-row">
          <span class="rb-card-number">01</span>
          <h3 class="rb-card-name">Understanding Quadrotor Dynamics and Control</h3>
        </div>
        <div class="rb-paper" aria-hidden="true">
          <div class="rb-paper-body">
            <p class="rb-paper-title">Understanding Quadrotor Dynamics and Control</p>
            <span class="rb-paper-abstract-label">Abstract</span>
            <hr class="rb-paper-abstract-rule"/>
            <p class="rb-paper-abstract">
              Newton-Euler dynamics on SE(3), and why geometric controllers sidestep Euler-angle singularities.
            </p>
          </div>
        </div>

        <span class="rb-card-cta">read the post <span class="arrow">→</span></span>
      </div>
    </a>

    <!-- 03 — Newton-Raphson Flow (published) -->
    <a class="rb-card" href="./posts/2025-05-22-NewtonRaphsonFlow/"
       data-status="published" data-tags="control theory iterative methods dynamical systems newton-raphson"
       aria-label="Read: Newton-Raphson Flow — From Iteration to Continuous Control">
      <div class="rb-card-summary">
        <div class="rb-card-name-row">
          <span class="rb-card-number">02</span>
          <h3 class="rb-card-name">Newton-Raphson Flow: From Iteration to Continuous Control</h3>
        </div>
        <div class="rb-paper" aria-hidden="true">
          <div class="rb-paper-body">
            <p class="rb-paper-title">Newton-Raphson Flow:<br/>From Iteration to Continuous Control</p>
            <span class="rb-paper-abstract-label">Abstract</span>
            <hr class="rb-paper-abstract-rule"/>
            <p class="rb-paper-abstract">
              Tracking reframed as a continuous-time Newton-Raphson root-finding problem — lightweight,
              retunable, deployable onboard a real quadrotor.
            </p>
          </div>
        </div>

        <span class="rb-card-cta">read the post <span class="arrow">→</span></span>
      </div>
    </a>

  </div>

  <!-- ───────  Drafts & Upcoming  ─────── -->
  <hr class="rb-divider" role="separator" aria-hidden="true"/>

  <p class="rb-section-kicker warn">drafts &middot; upcoming</p>
  <h2 class="rb-section-title" id="rb-drafts">Drafts &amp; Upcoming</h2>
  <p class="rb-section-blurb">
    Notes I've started or committed to writing but haven't shipped yet. The first card is a working draft you
    can peek at; the rest are placeholders for write-ups still in the queue. Dashed borders mean there is
    nothing to read yet — the cards are intentionally non-clickable so a click doesn't drop you onto an
    empty page.
  </p>

  <div class="rb-card-grid" id="rb-drafts-grid">

    <!-- 01 — Understanding PX4 (in progress, still a link — has GitHub references) -->
    <a class="rb-card wip" href="./posts/2025-10-15-UnderstandingPX4/"
       data-status="wip" data-tags="px4 quadrotor ros2 hardware tools software implementation"
       aria-label="Read draft: Understanding PX4 Autopilot and Offboard Control via ROS2">
      <div class="rb-card-summary">
        <div class="rb-card-name-row">
          <span class="rb-card-number">01</span>
          <h3 class="rb-card-name">Understanding PX4 Autopilot and Offboard Control via ROS 2</h3>
        </div>
        <div class="rb-card-meta">
          <span class="rb-status-pill wip">in progress</span>
        </div>

        <div class="rb-paper" aria-hidden="true">
          <div class="rb-paper-body">
            <p class="rb-paper-title">Understanding PX4 Autopilot and Offboard Control via ROS&nbsp;2</p>
            <span class="rb-paper-abstract-label">Abstract</span>
            <hr class="rb-paper-abstract-rule"/>
            <p class="rb-paper-abstract">
              Driving PX4 from ROS&nbsp;2 — the uXRCE-DDS bridge, offboard-mode entry conditions,
              and my modular offboard package.
            </p>
          </div>
        </div>

        <span class="rb-card-cta">read the post <span class="arrow">→</span></span>
      </div>
    </a>

    <!-- 04 — Understanding Game-Theoretic Control (TODO, non-link) -->
    <div class="rb-card draft" role="article"
         data-status="todo" data-tags="dynamical systems control theory game theory differential games"
         aria-labelledby="rb-draft-04">
      <div class="rb-card-summary">
        <div class="rb-card-name-row">
          <span class="rb-card-number">02</span>
          <h3 class="rb-card-name" id="rb-draft-04">Understanding Game-Theoretic Control</h3>
        </div>
        <div class="rb-card-meta">
          <span class="rb-status-pill todo">planned</span>
        </div>

        <div class="rb-paper" aria-hidden="true">
          <div class="rb-paper-body">
            <p class="rb-paper-title">Understanding Game-Theoretic Control</p>
            <span class="rb-paper-abstract-label">Abstract</span>
            <hr class="rb-paper-abstract-rule"/>
            <p class="rb-paper-abstract">
              Differential games as a lens on control: Nash equilibria and Isaacs as the minimax cousin of HJB.
            </p>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- 05 — Understanding JAX (TODO, non-link) -->
    <div class="rb-card draft" role="article"
         data-status="todo" data-tags="tools software jax implementation"
         aria-labelledby="rb-draft-05">
      <div class="rb-card-summary">
        <div class="rb-card-name-row">
          <span class="rb-card-number">03</span>
          <h3 class="rb-card-name" id="rb-draft-05">Understanding JAX for Control Research</h3>
        </div>
        <div class="rb-card-meta">
          <span class="rb-status-pill todo">planned</span>
        </div>

        <div class="rb-paper" aria-hidden="true">
          <div class="rb-paper-body">
            <p class="rb-paper-title">Understanding JAX for Control Research</p>
            <span class="rb-paper-abstract-label">Abstract</span>
            <hr class="rb-paper-abstract-rule"/>
            <p class="rb-paper-abstract">
              The case for JAX in control research: <em>jit</em>, <em>grad</em>, <em>vmap</em>, and pure-function controllers.
            </p>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- 06 — Understanding Optimal Control & CoV (TODO, non-link) -->
    <div class="rb-card draft" role="article"
         data-status="todo" data-tags="optimal control calculus of variations control theory pontryagin hjb"
         aria-labelledby="rb-draft-06">
      <div class="rb-card-summary">
        <div class="rb-card-name-row">
          <span class="rb-card-number">04</span>
          <h3 class="rb-card-name" id="rb-draft-06">Understanding Optimal Control &amp; Calculus of Variations</h3>
        </div>
        <div class="rb-card-meta">
          <span class="rb-status-pill todo">planned</span>
        </div>

        <div class="rb-paper" aria-hidden="true">
          <div class="rb-paper-body">
            <p class="rb-paper-title">Understanding Optimal Control &amp;<br/>Calculus of Variations</p>
            <span class="rb-paper-abstract-label">Abstract</span>
            <hr class="rb-paper-abstract-rule"/>
            <p class="rb-paper-abstract">
              From calculus of variations to Pontryagin and Hamilton-Jacobi-Bellman — why all three say the same thing.
            </p>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- 07 — Understanding Reachability (TODO, non-link) -->
    <div class="rb-card draft" role="article"
         data-status="todo" data-tags="reachability dynamical systems control theory safety"
         aria-labelledby="rb-draft-07">
      <div class="rb-card-summary">
        <div class="rb-card-name-row">
          <span class="rb-card-number">05</span>
          <h3 class="rb-card-name" id="rb-draft-07">Understanding Reachability Analysis</h3>
        </div>
        <div class="rb-card-meta">
          <span class="rb-status-pill todo">planned</span>
        </div>

        <div class="rb-paper" aria-hidden="true">
          <div class="rb-paper-body">
            <p class="rb-paper-title">Understanding Reachability Analysis</p>
            <span class="rb-paper-abstract-label">Abstract</span>
            <hr class="rb-paper-abstract-rule"/>
            <p class="rb-paper-abstract">
              What the reachable set actually is, and where mixed-monotone interval methods fit.
            </p>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- 08 — Understanding RL (TODO, non-link) -->
    <div class="rb-card draft" role="article"
         data-status="todo" data-tags="reinforcement learning control theory dynamical systems bellman"
         aria-labelledby="rb-draft-08">
      <div class="rb-card-summary">
        <div class="rb-card-name-row">
          <span class="rb-card-number">06</span>
          <h3 class="rb-card-name" id="rb-draft-08">Understanding Reinforcement Learning</h3>
        </div>
        <div class="rb-card-meta">
          <span class="rb-status-pill todo">planned</span>
        </div>

        <div class="rb-paper" aria-hidden="true">
          <div class="rb-paper-body">
            <p class="rb-paper-title">Understanding Reinforcement Learning</p>
            <span class="rb-paper-abstract-label">Abstract</span>
            <hr class="rb-paper-abstract-rule"/>
            <p class="rb-paper-abstract">
              RL as control under uncertainty: Bellman, TD vs Monte-Carlo, and policy gradient as calculus on expectations.
            </p>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

  </div>

  </article>

</div>

<script>
// Lightweight live filter across the hand-built blog cards.
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () {
  var input = document.querySelector('.rb-filter-input');
  var count = document.getElementById('rb-count-shown');
  if (!input || !count) return;

  var cards = Array.prototype.slice.call(
    document.querySelectorAll('#rb-card-grid .rb-card, #rb-drafts-grid .rb-card')
  );

  function applyFilter() {
    var q = input.value.trim().toLowerCase().replace(/^#/, '');
    var shown = 0;
    cards.forEach(function (card) {
      if (!q) { card.hidden = false; shown++; return; }
      var title = (card.querySelector('.rb-card-name') || {}).textContent || '';
      var tags  = card.getAttribute('data-tags') || '';
      var copy  = (card.querySelector('.rb-card-preview-copy') || {}).textContent || '';
      var hay = (title + ' ' + tags + ' ' + copy).toLowerCase();
      var match = hay.indexOf(q) !== -1;
      card.hidden = !match;
      if (match) shown++;
    });
    count.textContent = String(shown);
  }

  input.addEventListener('input', applyFilter);
});
</script>
```
